audit.auditor: blind 2-panel re-audit after canon-legal revise (both PASS, no P0/P1; 16/16 & 18/18 legible)

issues.fix: BINDING downstream: game-architect shows count/pace matches size-escalation via napkin, or clamp.

summary: Layer 1 core loop & pressure. Recovery blind-audit caught a P0 canon-contradiction (the-road-forgets = ambient within-run Standing decay, forbidden by locked L2 canon). USER CHOSE canon-legal fix. Reviser removed it; installed the-reach (outcome-only Standing pressure) + escalation-is-the-weather (season/Paling board escalation); re-keyed calendar to worked-mornings; renamed the-bench-fan -> the-returning-table. Verifier confirmed P0 resolved (4/4). Both blind re-auditors PASS, no P0/P1, all legible. Two residual P2s prose-corrected to match validated design. Canon-legal, spine-faithful; intuitiveness 1.0.
